expression: #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Changed Type",{{"air_date", "Air Date"}, {"average_rating", "Score"}, {"episode_number", "Episode No"}, {"original_title", "Original Title"}, {"primary_title", "Title"}, {"runtime_minutes", "Runtime (Min.)"}, {"season_number", "Season No."}, {"still_path", "Poster"}, {"vote_count", "Total Vote"}, {"episode_type", "Episode Type"}})
